mapper.select: SELECT ALARMID FROM NIA.TB_ALARM_CHECK WHERE ALARMID = #{elkAlarmId}

insert.if:
INSERT INTO NIA.TB_ALARM_MST(ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, UNIT, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, ALARMLEVEL) VALUES
((SELECT NEXTVAL('nia.seq_alarmno') ::VARCHAR), #{item.sysname}, #{item.equiptype}, #{item.unit}, #{item.alarmtime}, #{item.receivetime}, #{item.alarmloc}, #{item.alarmmsg}, #{item.alarmlevel})
